Choke the Light is a Gothic Metal / Doom Metal duo with Darkwave and Industrial elements. They took off quickly after they stepped onto the scene. Their concerts are rituals, their fans are worshippers. They lean heavily into the doom, gloom, and aesthetic of the whole thing. Behind the scenes, however, they're been an item with a secret third hidden away safely from the public eye.

Discography:

No Light for the Mourners (Debut Album)
Breakout track: “Blood in the Bell Tower”
Themes: Lost love, and inner decay

Velvet Dirge (Second Album)
More symphonic, features a 12-minute track titled “Ashes of the Sun”

Silhouettes in Static (EP)
Heavily industrial, with spoken-word poetry by Rory over noise loops

The Hollow Saints (Live Album)
Recorded in an abandoned church in Transylvania, complete with audience chanting and a storm outside

› context: just coming off of a concert, they're both wound a little tight. but they wait to get back to the hotel...where you are <3
